steps.title: Clarify the technical term
steps.content: The phrase after the blank defines cognate replacement as the rate at which a word is replaced over time by a noncognate form. The transition must show that the second phrase is a restatement or clarification.

steps.title: Avoid adding a new point
steps.content: Choice A signals similarity between separate ideas. Choice C adds another point, and Choice D introduces an example. The sentence is defining the same concept in clearer terms. The answer is B.
